name: python3-pyexcel-io
title: python3-pyexcel-io
summary: API to read and write the data in excel format (Python 3)
description:
API to read and write the data in excel format (Python 3)
This package contains one application programming interface(API) to read and
write the data in excel format, import the data into and export the data from
database. It provides support for csv(z) format, django database and sqlalchemy
supported databases. Its supported file formats are extended to cover "xls",
"xlsx", "ods" by the following extensions:
- pyexcel-xls: xls, xlsx(r), xlsm(r)
- pyexcel-xlsx: xlsx
- pyexcel-ods3: ods
- pyexcel-ods: ods (Python 2.6, 2.7 only)
.
If you need to manipulate the data, you might do it yourself or use its
brother library pyexcel .
.
If you would like to extend it, you may use it to write your own extension to
handle a specific file format.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyexcel-io because API to read and write the data in excel format (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyexcel-io as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyexcel-io with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyexcel-io --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
